mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspection_record WHERE created_at >= CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspection_record WHERE created_at >= CURDATE() AND has_anomaly = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inspection_record WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{minutes} MINUTE) AND has_anomaly = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE inspection_record SET review_status = #{reviewStatus}, review_result = #{reviewResult}, review_note = #{reviewNote}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = #{reviewedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
